title: moodle-panopto-downloader
description: A command-line tool for discovering and downloading Panopto videos embedded in Moodle courses via the official Moodle Web Services API. Developed at Hochschule Düsseldorf by ZWEK within the KIVi-Azubi research project.

creators.name: Steier, Christian-Maximilian
creators.affiliation: ZWEK – Centre for Training and Competence Development, Hochschule Düsseldorf – University of Applied Sciences
